expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: Result.md explicitly targets this scope: title section "phase4a — Integration/Composition Test Planning (Single Embedding Component; Panel-Stack + Lifecycle + Regression-Sensitive States)" and the Objective lists "Panel-stack composition behaviors", "Embedding lifecycle", and "Regression-sensitive integration states". Sections 1–3 provide detailed coverage for each.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Result.md states "Primary phase under test: phase4a" and provides an integration/composition test plan (not defect analysis or requirements). It includes "Objective (phase4a contract-aligned)" and a "Minimal Test Matrix (phase4a-ready)" plus a self-check: "Output aligns with phase4a: Yes — this is an integration/composition test plan".
